title: オゥ！　トゥナイト・パーティー☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out shopping in the shopping
district...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Darn it! I've gone and bought too much stuff! Now
what?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Darn it! I've gone and bought too much stuff! Now
what?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Why, howdy! Fancy seein' you here! Well, y'see,
I'm havin' a party tonight!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've been all excited since this mornin', and I
bought a buncha stuff for it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But have a look-see! The way home's jam-packed
with people, and I'm in a real pinch!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the time to take the long way
neither. Maybe I should just go the usual route...
choice_data_list: Take the long way and run as fast as you can!
Take the long way and run as fast as you can!
Imagine yourself parting the crowd as you run!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the time to take the long way
neither. Maybe I should just go the usual route...
choice_data_list: Take the long way and run as fast as you can!
Take the long way and run as fast as you can!
Imagine yourself parting the crowd as you run!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now that's a mighty fine idea! So long's I kick 'er
into high gear, I should make it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw! Time to dash on home!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well I'll be! Color me enlightened!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw! I'll give it a real good shot!
